/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libuav_mode_supervisor__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libuav_mode_supervisor__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/uav_mode_supervisor__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/uav_mode_supervisor/msg/detail/supervisor_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/uav_mode_supervisor__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/uav_mode_supervisor/srv/detail/command_supervisor__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
